name: rive-animation-viewer
description: Desktop and web viewer for .riv files with ViewModel controls, artboard/animation switching, script editor, event console, standalone export, and MCP remote control

scripts.test: npm run generate:snippets && npm run check:architecture && npm run check:deps && vitest run
scripts.test:ui: npm run test:coverage && node scripts/prepare-vitest-ui-theme.mjs && vitest --ui --coverage.enabled --api.port 51204 --api.host 127.0.0.1 --api.strictPort
scripts.test:coverage:serve: npm run test:coverage && node scripts/serve-static.mjs coverage 4174 127.0.0.1
scripts.build: npm run generate:snippets && node scripts/build-mcp-sidecar.mjs && node scripts/build-dist.mjs
scripts.build:full: npm run build && npm run tauri build
